title: Yennaidhu (yenna idhu) lyrics mouna guru songs lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Rahul Nambiar, Ranjith, Rita, Ramya
Song: Yennayidhu
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar
MOvie: Mouna Guru
Music:  Thaman S

Yennaidhu idhu enna thollai
En manasu ennidam illai
Mounam vandhu milungudhu sollai, yeno ?

Kaalirandum udan vara villai
Un adhayum prindhida villai
Kannimaigal urangida villai, yeno ?, yeno ?

Undhan thanimaiyil ulaginil mudhalurai
oru mugam adik kadi adik kadi varudha ?
Undhan thalaiyanai uraigalil kanavennum poochedi
muthamittu pookalai tharudha ?

Undhan nadai udai bhaavanai sindhanai
Yaavilum pudhu pudhu maatrangal varudha ?
oru chellamazhai pookal kannukulle vandhu
vittu vittu vedhanaigal tharudha ?

Idhu yeno ? oh ..Idhu yeno ?
Yennaidhuvo?  Yennaidhuvo?
ennavendru ayyo puriyaadha
Kannimoodi neye unnai uttru paarthaal
ullam sollaadha ?

Yennaidhuvo?  Yennaidhuvo?
ennavendru ayyo puriyaadha
Ondrum ondrum ondruserndhu
ondraagum unmai puriyaadha?
Yeno? yeno ?               (Yennaidhu idhu ...)

Neram varum varai, en manadhukul nooru thee azhai
Idhu yedhanaalo ? ayyoooh ?
Paarvai orumurai nee paarthadhum saaral palamurai
Idhu yedhanaalo ?  oh ...oh

Ne orumurai paarthaal irudhyam uraiyum
idhuenna idhu yeno ?
Ayyo ne marumurai paarthail irudhyam thudikum
idhuenna idhu yeno ?
Idhu yeno ?.... Ondraaga thozhaindhomo ?

Yennaidhuvo?  Yennaidhuvo?
ennavendru ayyo puriyaadha
Virumbi vandhu maationdaal
mandhirathai ullam sollaaadha ?

Yennaidhuvo?  Yennaidhuvo?
ennavendru ayyo theriyaadha
Thirumba thirumba maatik kollum
thandhirathaal nejjam thullaadha?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yennaidhu'?

'Yennaidhu' explores themes of longing and emotional turmoil, reflecting the inner struggles of the characters in Mouna Guru.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Mouna Guru, highlighting the protagonist's feelings of isolation and heartache.

Who are the singers of 'Yennaidhu'?

The song features a collaboration of talented artists including Rahul Nambiar, Ramya, Ranjith, and Rita.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Yennaidhu' was composed by Thaman S, known for his ability to blend emotions with melody.

When was 'Yennaidhu' released?

'Yennaidhu' was released on November 18, 2011, as part of the Mouna Guru soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Yennaidhu' is a poignant melody that encapsulates the feelings of despair and longing experienced by the characters in Mouna Guru. The song's lyrics, crafted by Na Muthukumar, delve into the depths of emotional isolation, while the harmonious blend of voices from the singers adds to its haunting quality. The music composed by Thaman S enhances the overall mood, making it a reflective piece that resonates with listeners. This song serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of introspection and heartache.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yennaidhu from the Mouna Guru soundtrack is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of longing and introspection. With a unique collaboration of voices from Rahul Nambiar, Ramya, Ranjith, and Rita, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced heartache. The masterful composition by Thaman S elevates the emotional weight of the lyrics penned by Na Muthukumar, making it a must-listen for fans of soulful music.
stanzaMeanings: What is this? My heart is not with me. Silence has come and is whispering something, what is it?
The time is not coming, and it is not coming with you. The eyes are not closing, what is it? What is it?
In your solitude, is there a face that speaks first in this world? In your dreams, does your head bloom like a flower?
Your walk and your feelings, are new changes coming everywhere? A gentle flower comes and brings pain inside the eyes?
What is this? Oh... What is this? What is this? What is this? Why can't I understand? When I see you, my heart doesn't speak?
What is this? What is this? Why can't I understand? Everything is mixed up, and the truth is not clear? What is it? What is it? (What is this?)
Until the time comes, my heart is burning with a hundred flames. Is this something? Oh? When you look at me, is it something simple? Is this something? Oh... oh.
When you look at me, does it speak of something? Oh, when you look at me again, does it hurt? What is this? Is it something? Are we connected?
What is this? What is this? Why can't I understand? When it comes, it doesn't speak to the heart?
What is this? What is this? Why can't I understand? Turning back and forth, does the magic not work?
What is it? What is it? What is it? What is it?
